Class NotNullStringType

java.lang.Object
org.openxava.types.NotNullStringType
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.hibernate.usertype.UserType
public class NotNullStringType extends Object implements org.hibernate.usertype.UserType
Allows to remove null for strings on save and on load from database.

Author:
Javier Paniza
